title: Senior Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates Capital India are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates Capital India:
Prestige Estates Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates Capital India!
